title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Juspay - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Juspay - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Juspay are looking for an experienced Risk Analyst based out of Vijayawada. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Juspay:
Juspay is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Ind AS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Juspay!
